pari-√śuṣ P. Ā. -śuṣyati, ˚te, to be thoroughly dried up, to shrivel, wither (lit. and fig.), pine, waste away,  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c.:
Caus. -śoṣayati (Pass. -śoṣyate), to dry up, emaciate,  Kāv. ;  Pañc. ;  Suśr.

results.rendered_html:
pariśuṣ 4 P.
1 To be dried up, dry up;  Bk. 10. 41 ;  Bg. 1. 29. 
2
(pb) To pine, decay, wither.
3 To be afflicted.
— Caus. To emaciate.
